## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run compile` succeeds
- [ ] Any related behavior was smoke-tested in an Extension Development Host

## Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed and followed [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md)
- [ ] If I added/changed commands, I updated both `package.json` contributions and command registration in `src/extension.ts`
- [ ] If I changed tree behavior, `contextValue` values and `when` clauses still match
- [ ] If UI labels/icons changed, `README.md` still reflects behavior

## Notes for reviewers

Call out risks, edge cases, or areas that need extra attention.
